{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Outer Disciple Hall
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Outer Disciple Hall]] is located at the center of [[Mount Samara]] up the mountain.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
